hero.tagline: Decentralized swap · Secure · Fast · Low fees
hero.title: Swap for SAP
hero.subtitle: Swap mainstream stablecoins for SAP—lower fees when you shop, merchant perks, and early access to ecosystem campaigns.

hints.walletRequired: Wallet not connected. Connect to swap or pay a deposit.
hints.depositLocked: No pending deposit—the deposit tab stays locked.

deposit.title: Merchant security deposit
deposit.subtitle: Pay before the deadline or the request expires.
deposit.footnote: This flow links from Admin. On-chain confirmation follows backend callbacks.

swap.title: Token swap
swap.subtitle: Swap mainstream tokens for SAP
swap.noTokensAvailable: No swap tokens available on this chain

cctp.title: Cross-chain swap (CCTP)
cctp.subtitle: Bridge USDC to Arc, then swap to SAP
cctp.waitingRelay: On Arc — waiting for cross-chain arrival...
cctp.relayerHint: Arrival is polled by the backend Relayer (attestation + Arc mint)
cctp.usdcOnlyHint: Circle CCTP only supports native USDC. Other tokens (e.g. USDT) cannot use this rail.
cctp.flowHint: Required: pick source → enter amount → approve & burn → wait for arrival → approve & swap on Arc. Arrival is handled by the Relayer (no extra signature).
cctp.notice: Cross-chain swap needs a small amount of ETH on the source chain for Gas. Steps: approve & burn, wait for arrival, then approve & swap to SAP on Arc. Failures usually do not lose tokens—check the on-chain tx and retry.
cctp.autoSwapping: Confirm the swap in your wallet...
cctp.gasHint: Burn requires Gas on {{chain}}: keep a little testnet ETH in addition to USDC.
cctp.mintedPleaseConfirm: USDC minted on destination. Tap Approve and swap SAP below to confirm in your wallet.
cctp.swapWalletTimeout: Wallet did not respond. Tap the button below to confirm the swap again.

sapVisual.name: SAP Token
sapVisual.tagline: Core token of the SAPMall ecosystem
